name: praxis
description: Praxis — the disciplined practice of engineering, applied automatically in Claude Code. Turns a terse prompt into a full pipeline: restructure into a spec, investigate, plan, implement to production standard with professional code-craft and the right best-practices, then run an adversarial vertical+horizontal audit (incl. completeness/no-regression) and update the project's living knowledge (/docs, CHANGELOG, ADRs), and deliver the result as a reviewable pull request. Includes a full front-end pipeline (business research → story-first wireframes → design system → build → optimize) with accessibility and design-consistency audits for any UI niche. Bootstraps any repo, keeps CLAUDE.md and docs regression-free, and can run fully autonomous (auto-pilot) — all enforced via hooks and read-only subagents.
